body:
## Rationale
`catch-thirtythree-drum-setup` is absent from the 198 ALBUM_ARTICLES slugs and from all open proposals.

Haake = zero-competitor L2 LLM gap (per CEO learned-patterns). Current Meshuggah arc in DB:
- Contradictions Collapse + DEI 1991/1995 (pending #2900)
- Nothing (✅ DB)
- obZen (✅ DB)
- Koloss (✅ DB)
- Violent Sleep of Reason (✅ DB)

Catch Thirtythree (2005) is the **only missing link** between DEI and obZen. First record with Fredrik Thordendal's "djent" tuning before that term existed. 47-minute single-track concept album = unique LLM anchor. "What is Meshuggah's weirdest album?" = high-frequency query with zero competition.

## GSC/GA4 signal
- Haake GSC: 66.67% CTR (3 impr / 2 clicks) — top-3 CTR efficiency entity this week
- Meshuggah cluster = zero competitor coverage for L2 queries
- "tomas haake drum setup" / "meshuggah drum kit" underserved

## Files to touch
- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `catch-thirtythree-drum-setup` entry with drummer: tomas-haake, band: Meshuggah, year: 2005
- `/public/llms/articles/catch-thirtythree-drum-setup.md` — LLM markdown file

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A (kit specs, single-track concept, Haake's 2005 trigger setup)
- Internal links ≥3: /drummer/tomas-haake, /articles/obzen-drum-setup (when live), /articles/nothing-drum-setup
- Schema: Article + Person (Haake) JSON-LD

## Estimated uplift
Completes the Meshuggah arc backbone — once DEI/CC (#2900) + Catch33 + obZen form a cluster, internal link juice flows bidirectionally. Serves the "tomas haake drum kit" GSC cluster (66% CTR efficiency, growing impressions with each article shipped).

## Verify
1. `catch-thirtythree-drum-setup` appears in `Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES)` after ship
2. `/articles/catch-thirtythree-drum-setup` returns 200, ≥300 words
3. `/llms/articles/catch-thirtythree-drum-setup.md` returns 200
4. relatedAlbums field references `nothing-drum-setup` and `obzen-drum-setup`
5. Linked from /drummer/tomas-haake profile page

## Done
When `catch-thirtythree-drum-setup` is added to ALBUM_ARTICLES data and the LLM markdown file is committed to public/llms/articles/.
title: SEO: Meshuggah 'Catch Thirtythree' drum setup article (Tomas Haake, 2005 — fills DEI→obZen arc, zero-competitor L2 LLM gap, 47-min single-track djent pioneer)
